## Summary

Please explain the change in one short paragraph.

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `moon fmt --check`
- [ ] I ran `moon check --deny-warn`
- [ ] I ran `moon test --deny-warn`
- [ ] I ran `python scripts/verify.py` or documented why a narrower check is sufficient
- [ ] I updated docs, examples, or reports when behavior changed
- [ ] I verified the playground flow when touching the bridge or browser demo
- [ ] I regenerated canonical metrics instead of copying volatile counts by hand
- [ ] If AI materially assisted this change, I reviewed the full diff and disclosed assumptions or tradeoffs

## Notes

Include anything reviewers should pay attention to, such as compatibility tradeoffs, release impact, AI-assisted decisions, failing checks encountered, or follow-up work.
